member.name: T:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Constants.CustomerConstants
member.summary: Contains all constant values used across the Customer Details API project.

member.name: F:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Constants.CustomerConstants.CustomersRoute
member.summary: Base route for customer endpoints.

member.name: F:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Constants.CustomerConstants.IdRoute
member.summary: Route suffix for ID-based endpoints.

member.name: F:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Constants.CustomerConstants.SearchRoute
member.summary: Route suffix for search endpoint.

member.name: F:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Constants.CustomerConstants.CustomerNotFound
member.summary: Error message when a customer is not found.

member.name: F:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Constants.CustomerConstants.InvalidRequest
member.summary: Error message when the request body is invalid.

member.name: F:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Constants.CustomerConstants.SearchQueryRequired
member.summary: Error message when the search query is missing or empty.

member.name: F:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Constants.CustomerConstants.IdMismatch
member.summary: Error message when the customer ID in the URL does not match the body.

member.name: F:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Constants.CustomerConstants.SwaggerTitle
member.summary: Swagger/OpenAPI document title.

member.name: F:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Constants.CustomerConstants.SwaggerVersion
member.summary: Swagger/OpenAPI document version.

member.name: F:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Constants.CustomerConstants.SwaggerDescription
member.summary: Swagger/OpenAPI description.

member.name: F:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Constants.CustomerConstants.Empty
member.summary: Default empty string.

member.name: T:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Controllers.CustomerController
member.summary: Provides RESTful API endpoints for managing customer details.

member.name: M:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Controllers.CustomerController.#ctor(Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Interfaces.ICustomerService)
member.summary: Initialises a new instance of .

member.name: M:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Controllers.CustomerController.GetAll
member.summary: Retrieves all customers.

member.name: M:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Controllers.CustomerController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a single customer by ID.
member.response: If the customer is not found.

member.name: M:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Controllers.CustomerController.Search(System.String)
member.summary: Searches customers by name, email, or phone number (partial, case-insensitive).
member.response: Returns the list of matching customers (may be empty).
If the query parameter is missing or empty.

member.name: M:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Controllers.CustomerController.Create(Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Models.Customer)
member.summary: Creates a new customer.
member.response: If the request body is invalid.

member.name: M:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Controllers.CustomerController.Update(System.Int32,Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Models.Customer)
member.summary: Updates an existing customer.
member.response: If the ID in the URL does not match the body.
If the customer is not found.

member.name: M:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Controllers.CustomerController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a customer by ID.
member.response: If the customer is not found.

member.name: T:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Interfaces.ICustomerRepository
member.summary: Defines the contract for customer data access operations.

member.name: M:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Interfaces.ICustomerRepository.GetAllAsync
member.summary: Retrieves all customers.

member.name: M:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Interfaces.ICustomerRepository.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a customer by their unique identifier.
member.returns: The customer, or null if not found.

member.name: M:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Interfaces.ICustomerRepository.SearchAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Searches customers by a query string across name, email, and phone fields.

member.name: M:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Interfaces.ICustomerRepository.CreateAsync(Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Models.Customer)
member.summary: Creates a new customer.
member.returns: The created customer with its assigned ID.

member.name: M:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Interfaces.ICustomerRepository.UpdateAsync(Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Models.Customer)
member.summary: Updates an existing customer.
member.returns: The updated customer, or null if not found.

member.name: M:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Interfaces.ICustomerRepository.DeleteAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a customer by their unique identifier.

member.name: T:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Interfaces.ICustomerService
member.summary: Defines the contract for customer business-logic operations.

member.name: M:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Interfaces.ICustomerService.GetAllAsync
member.summary: Gets all customers.

member.name: M:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Interfaces.ICustomerService.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a customer by ID.
member.returns: The customer, or null if not found.

member.name: M:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Interfaces.ICustomerService.SearchAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Searches customers by a query string.

member.name: M:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Interfaces.ICustomerService.CreateAsync(Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Models.Customer)
member.summary: Creates a new customer.

member.name: M:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Interfaces.ICustomerService.UpdateAsync(Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Models.Customer)
member.summary: Updates an existing customer.
member.returns: The updated customer, or null if not found.

member.name: M:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Interfaces.ICustomerService.DeleteAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a customer by ID.

member.name: T:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.MockData.CustomerMockData
member.summary: Provides seeded in-memory mock data for the Customer repository.

member.name: M:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.MockData.CustomerMockData.GetSeedData
member.summary: Returns a seeded list of sample objects.

member.name: T:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Models.Customer
member.summary: Represents a customer entity.

member.name: P:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Models.Customer.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier.

member.name: P:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Models.Customer.FirstName
member.summary: Gets or sets the first name.

member.name: P:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Models.Customer.LastName
member.summary: Gets or sets the last name.

member.name: P:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Models.Customer.Email
member.summary: Gets or sets the email address.

member.name: P:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Models.Customer.PhoneNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets the phone number.

member.name: P:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Models.Customer.Address
member.summary: Gets or sets the address.

member.name: P:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Models.Customer.CreatedDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the date the record was created.

member.name: P:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Models.Customer.UpdatedDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the date the record was last updated.

member.name: T:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Repositories.CustomerRepository
member.summary: Provides in-memory CRUD operations for entities.

member.name: M:Relevantz.API.CustomerDetails.Repositories.CustomerRepository.#ctor
member.summary: Initialises a new instance of with seeded mock data.

member.summary: Implements business-logic operations for customers by delegating to .

member.summary: Initialises a new instance of .
